headline: Youlife Group Appoints Liqun Yao As Acting CFO To Replace Lidong Zhu

headline: CerraCap Impact Venture Capital Appoints Former Silicon Valley Bank and Equifax CIO Mark Rohrwasser to Lead CXO Council
summary: CerraCap Impact Venture Capital ("CIVC") today announced the appointment of Mark Rohrwasser, former Chief Information Officer of Silicon Valley Bank and Equifax, to lead its CXO Council.

headline: Equifax partners with Poland's leading credit bureau to expand client access to identity and fraud solutions
summary: Equifax UK and Biuro Informacji Kredytowej S.A. (BIK), Poland's primary credit bureau, have partnered to broaden client access to their respective identity verification and fraud prevention capabilities, helping more businesses to tackle increasingly sophisticated fraud and enable safer customer journeys.
